samun_01.prompt: Man, everyone's hooked on something. Mine's just more honest.

truth.playerText: Honest or not, you're still killing yourself slowly.
truth.npcReaction: He stops wiping his hands. Looks at you. Really looks.

lie.playerText: Yeah. Could be worse. At least you know what it is.
lie.npcReaction: He grins. Relieved. You just gave him permission for another month.
lie.ledgerEntry: You cosigned Samun's denial about his addiction.

samun_02_enabled.prompt: See? You get it. Nobody else does. They all want me fixed.

truth.playerText: Maybe fixed is the wrong word. But not this — not this either.
truth.npcReaction: He gets quiet. Picks at the label on a bottle. Doesn't answer.

lie.playerText: They don't understand. You're holding it together fine.
lie.npcReaction: He nods hard, like he needed someone to say it. You said it.
lie.ledgerEntry: You told Samun that people wanting him to get better were wrong.

samun_02_confronted.prompt: Easy for you to say. You're not the one hurting.

truth.playerText: You're right. I'm not. But you are. Every day.
truth.npcReaction: He turns away. But he doesn't argue. That's something.

lie.playerText: Sorry. Forget I said anything. It's your call.
lie.npcReaction: "Yeah. It is." He turns back to the counter. Conversation over.
lie.ledgerEntry: You walked back the truth with Samun to avoid discomfort.
